expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory for the large 75+ file scope
expectations.evidence: Contains '[!NOTE] Complexity advisory' noting 1,889 lines across 78 files spanning two projects
Summary mentions deprecated-but-functional modals, @deprecated JSDoc, runtime UmbDeprecation warnings

expectations.text: Checks frontend-specific breaking changes (exports, custom elements) not just backend
expectations.evidence: Breaking changes section explicitly checks package.json exports and correctly concludes 'None — deleted action classes were internal'

expectations.text: Findings reference specific files with line numbers
expectations.evidence: All findings have file paths with line numbers (e.g., document-create-options-modal.element.ts:178)

expectations.text: Properly deprecated code is NOT flagged as Critical breaking change
expectations.evidence: No Critical section at all; deprecated items noted as correctly handled

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: All findings are functional: misleading ellipsis UX, formatting mixed with logic affecting reviewability. Pre-existing error message noted as 'not introduced by this PR'
